title: Extracting Phone Numbers from Text Data
scenario: Extract phone numbers from a sample text data set containing user profiles and contact information. Output should include extracted phone numbers and their corresponding user names. The output should be formatted as a list with phone numbers as headers and should be limited to 100 words.
constraints: Phone numbers must be properly formatted

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted data is accurate and based on the provided text data.
